retracted.description: Only include the RETRACTED_BLOCK section and its preceding divider when there are retracted findings

not_applied.description: Only include the NOT_APPLIED_BLOCK section and its preceding divider when there are non-applied findings

formatting_guidelines.executive_summary: 📌 *Resumo Executivo* — max 5 lines. Start with correction status (X/Y applied). State recommendation change (previous → new). End with clear verdict.
formatting_guidelines.applied_block:
✅  *{{APPLIED_LABEL}}* ({{APPLIED_COUNT}}/{{TOTAL_FINDINGS}})

Each item: • severity_icon description — `file:line`

Use \n\n between items for breathing room. Keep each item to one line.
formatting_guidelines.retracted_block:
⚠️  *{{RETRACTED_LABEL}}* ({{RETRACTED_COUNT}})

Each item: • severity_icon ~~original finding~~ → _reason it was wrong_

Use strikethrough for the original finding text.
formatting_guidelines.updated_counts:
Inline format: 🔴 X {{CRITICAL_LABEL}}  ·  🟠 X {{MAJOR_LABEL}}  ·  🟡 X {{MINOR_LABEL}}  ·  🔵 X {{SUGGESTION_LABEL}}  ·  ✅ text

Show remaining open items only. If all resolved: single line with ✅ message.
formatting_guidelines.recommendation_block:
{{RECOMMENDATION_EMOJI}} *{{RECOMMENDATION}}*

If APPROVE: brief positive summary.
If still REQUEST_CHANGES: numbered list of remaining items.

followup_specific: FOLLOWUP_ICON — ✅ if approve, ♻️ if still needs changes
FOLLOWUP_COMMIT — short SHA of the correction commit
NOT_APPLIED_BLOCK — formatted not-applied list with justifications
TOTAL_FINDINGS — total findings from original review
